# India’s First Quantum Academy for Educators and Innovators
Building Quantum-Ready Workforce for Quantum Communication

Why QNu Academy?
## Building Quantum-Ready Workforce for Quantum Communication
The Quantum communication revolution is creating an unprecedented demand for a new generation for experts. QNu Academy offers certified programs, industry-relevant programs, faculty upskilling, hands-on quantum labs, real-time projects to develop quantum communication experts, empowering you to become a future leader.  

![Elite Backing & Innovation](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/685146634c5d77b832941ea6_Elite%20Backing%20%26%20Innovation.webp)
Elite Backing & Innovation
From QNu Labs, backed by the **National Quantum Mission** , pioneering breakthroughs in secure quantum communication.
![Certified Education Ecosystem](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/6851467df948b56c3b379518_Certified%20Education%20Ecosystem.webp)
Certified Education Ecosystem
Building certified quantum communication ecosystems with colleges, meeting the highest international teaching and research standards.
![Advanced Lab Solutions](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/6851468a7448148c9b015139_Advanced%20Lab%20Solutions.webp)
Advanced Lab Solutions
Hands-on learning with advanced physical and virtual labs featuring commercial QKD, QRNG, and more.
![Faculty Upskilling & Certification](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/685151781998dd438a165d7d_Faculty%20Certification.webp)
Faculty Upskilling & Certification
We upskill and certify college faculty to deliver effective, industry-aligned quantum communication courses to students.
![Industry Integration & Careers](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/68514ecc38275750f4e99dce_Industry%20Integration%20%26%20Careers.webp)
Industry Integration & Careers
Connecting students to industry leaders through internships, live projects, research, and placements in key sectors.
![University Brand Leadership](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/68514ed6606d26b6e9ade5b6_University%20Brand%20Leadership.webp)
University Brand Leadership
Position your university as a quantum communication hub, helping attract top students and secure research grants.
[Download a Brochure](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/6853faea279b17b72ec4a180_qnu-academy-brochure.pdf)
Who Is It For?
## Tailored Pathways for Educators & Innovators
Faculty and students with a basic understanding of **electromagnetism, modern physics, information theory, or quantum mechanics**.
![Turnkey Solution](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/6851518e7556939315af9138_Turnkey%20Solution.webp)
Turnkey Solution
End-to-end lab setup, curriculum, and faculty development. You can rent these labs for advanced technology projects.
![Faculty Certification](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/68514ec0c59e496eb8c54434_Faculty%20Upskilling%20%26%20Certification.webp)
Faculty Certification
Faculty development programs led by top tier Institutions will nurture you to compete with Ivy League Institutions.
![Brand Leadership](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/685158a932ce3d0e6ce6bd50_Brand%20Leadership.webp)
Brand Leadership
With 100+ industry-academia partnerships position your university as a quantum communication education hub, attracting grants and global talent.
![Industry Validation](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/68515cee56985066ae13ac22_Industry%20Validation.webp)
Industry Validation
Industry-relevant skills with hands-on lab access. Paternal company QNu labs is backed by [National Quantum Mission (NQM) - Department of Science and Technology, Govt. of India](https://dst.gov.in/national-quantum-mission-nqm)
[Enquire Now](https://www.qnulabs.com/qnu-academy#enquiry-demo)
Explore Our Offerings
## QNu Academy Offerings
Dive into real-world labs, interactive projects, and industry-recognized certifications. Join us and turn your curiosity into a career advantage, as you explore tomorrow’s technology in an interactive and supportive environment led by the world’s leading quantum communication educators.
Quantum Communication LabsQNu Academy Certification CourseFaculty Development Programs
![Quantum Labs](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/685168e036b47c85ae33c857_Quantum%20Labs.webp)
Discover our Center of Excellence Lab—a space where top talent comes together to solve real-world industry relevant problems. Here, you’ll connect with global experts, get hands-on practical experience, and be part of breakthrough quantum communication research that shapes the future.
Physical CoE Lab & remote learning via [QShield](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-security-platform) Virtual Lab
[Armos (QKD)](https://www.qnulabs.com/quantum-key-distribution) India’s first commercial Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) system
Cater to both academic teaching and advanced research- meets industry standards
Integration with real QNu deployments
Qshield platform enables collaborative project-based learning across multiple product lines
[Enquire Now](https://www.qnulabs.com/qnu-academy#enquiry-demo)
![QNu Academy Certification Course](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/685168f61dee6544b85ddb4e_QNu%20Academy%20Certification%20Course.webp)
India faces a big digital talent gap—30% by 2028—even with 1.5 million graduates every year. Only one in four engineers is job-ready, don't become one of them. At QNu Academy, you’ll get hands-on with real labs, simple tools, and courses built for today’s industries.
Globally recognized, industry-certified quantum communication education 
Centralized access to quantum communication courses, resources, and virtual labs
SPARQ internships and job opportunities for exceptional performers
Research collaborations 
Live projects 
[Enquire Now](https://www.qnulabs.com/qnu-academy#enquiry-demo)
![Faculty Development Programs](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660f833875f3ae90553f1584/685165f79e227e272b4688f8_Faculty%20Development%20Programs.webp)
Access to quality education with practical exposure is limited. We are bridging the gap through QNu’s intensive blended training for professors which includes:  

Quantum Communication curriculum modules
On-premises Quantum Communication labs via hardware
Simulation tools and assessments
Virtual labs via QShield platform for remote access
Videos lecture
[Enquire Now](https://www.qnulabs.com/qnu-academy#enquiry-demo)
Enquire Now!
### Build Quantum-Safe Skills with QNu Academy
Upskill your teams with expert-led learning in quantum cryptography, secure networks, and future-ready cybersecurity.  

## Sales
We’d love to talk about how we can work together.  

sales@qnulabs.com
### Support
We’re here to help with any questions you may have.  

info@qnulabs.com
## Frequently asked questions 
Who should enroll in QNu Academy? 
Faculty and students with a basic understanding of electromagnetism, modern physics, information theory, or quantum mechanics. At present we are working with only universities and universities' faculties to democratize the quantum communication in India and globally. We're not accepting individual students or[join us](https://www.qnulabs.com/qnu-academy).
Is the course self-paced?
It uses a hybrid approach, blending self-paced learning with instructor-led sessions.
Do we need to pass an exam to earn the certification? 
Yes, You can earn certification when you pass all assessments and required qualification in the learning path. 
What are job roles you can expect?
Roles range from quantum software developers to hardware engineers and product managers, covering skills in quantum communication, physics, and engineering. 
Which Companies are hiring in this domain?
Startups, top tech giants, PSUs, government institutions, and leading universities worldwide are all actively hiring in quantum technology.
What are the expected salaries?
The salaries are **30%** more than Industry Standards. Quantum researchers get more salaries in comparison to Data Engineers and AI professionals.
Do we get a job after completing this certification?
This course will upgrade your skills to make you job-ready.
What exactly is QNu Academy? 
Well, it’s an innovative initiative from [QNu Labs](https://www.qnulabs.com/about-us), backed by the [National Quantum Mission (NQM).](https://dst.gov.in/national-quantum-mission-nqm) The goal is to equip students, educators, and professionals with the skills they need to thrive in the quantum world. By focusing on practical, industry-relevant training in areas.
What is the difference between Quantum communication and Quantum Computing?
Quantum communication is all about sending information in an ultra-secure way using the quirky rules of quantum physics.Quantum computing, meanwhile, uses quantum bits to solve problems much faster than today’s most powerful computers.
## Are You Ready to Witness the Future of Data Security?
